name: feature-announcement
description: Changelog entries, release notes, what's new posts, product updates
usage_hint: Use for changelog entries, release notes, "what's new" posts, and product update communications. The audience already uses the product — this tells them what changed and why it matters.

criteria.name: technical-accuracy
criteria.description: Feature announcements must describe what actually shipped

criteria.name: value-proposition-clarity
criteria.description: Users need to understand why the change matters to them

criteria.name: information-architecture
criteria.description: Logical structure helps users find relevant updates quickly

criteria.name: customer-empathy
criteria.description: Announcements framed around user benefit drive adoption

criteria.name: tone-alignment
criteria.description: Tone should match the product's voice even in technical content

criteria.name: brand-consistency
criteria.description: Every communication reinforces or undermines brand
